member.name: T:AppUser.Converters.BoolInverterConverter
member.summary: Converts bool to inverted bool (used for IsEnabled = !IsLoading)

member.name: T:AppUser.Converters.StringNotEmptyConverter
member.summary: Returns true if string is not null or empty

member.name: T:AppUser.Converters.StringContainsConverter
member.summary: Returns true if string contains substring

member.name: T:AppUser.Converters.IntIsZeroConverter
member.summary: Returns true if int is zero

member.name: T:AppUser.Converters.TimeSpanToStringConverter
member.summary: Formats TimeSpan as mm:ss

member.name: T:AppUser.Models.AudioGuideDto
member.summary: Audio guide stream URL for a POI

member.name: T:AppUser.Models.MenuDto
member.summary: Menu DTO

member.name: T:AppUser.Models.MenuItemDto
member.summary: Menu Item DTO

member.name: T:AppUser.Models.POITranslationDto
member.summary: POI Translation (multi-language content)

member.name: T:AppUser.Models.POIDto
member.summary: Main POI Data Transfer Object

member.name: T:AppUser.Models.ShopDto
member.summary: Shop (cửa hàng) DTO

member.name: T:AppUser.Models.UserDto
member.summary: Data Transfer Object for User entity

member.name: T:AppUser.Services.AudioService
member.summary: AudioService - Manages audio playback state for POI audio guides. MAUI MediaElement handles actual streaming from URL.

member.name: M:AppUser.Services.AudioService.LoadGuide(AppUser.Models.AudioGuideDto,AppUser.Models.POIDto)
member.summary: Load an audio guide for playback

member.name: M:AppUser.Services.AudioService.SetPlayState(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Set play state

member.name: M:AppUser.Services.AudioService.SetLanguage(System.String)
member.summary: Switch language for audio guides

member.name: M:AppUser.Services.AudioService.GetGuideForPOI(AppUser.Models.POIDto)
member.summary: Get audio guide for a POI in current language

member.name: M:AppUser.Services.AudioService.GetRecentHistory
member.summary: Get recent listen history (last 20)

member.name: P:AppUser.Services.AudioService.Progress
member.summary: Get progress (0.0 - 1.0)

member.name: T:AppUser.Services.AuthService
member.summary: AuthService - Handles user authentication. Currently uses mock data. Replace with HttpClient calls when API is ready.

member.name: M:AppUser.Services.AuthService.LoginAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Login with email and password

member.name: M:AppUser.Services.AuthService.LogoutAsync
member.summary: Logout current user

member.name: M:AppUser.Services.AuthService.GetCurrentUser
member.summary: Get current logged-in user

member.name: T:AppUser.Services.POIService
member.summary: POIService - Provides POI data. Currently mock data. TODO: Replace with HttpClient calls to API. API base: http://localhost:5279/api/

members.member: Get featured POIs for home screen TODO: GET /api/pois/featured
Get POI by Id TODO: GET /api/pois/{id}
Search POIs by name or location TODO: GET /api/pois/search?q={query}

member.name: M:AppUser.ViewModels.AudioPlayerViewModel.UpdateProgress(System.TimeSpan,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Called from code-behind when MediaElement position changes

member.name: M:AppUser.ViewModels.AudioPlayerViewModel.OnAudioGuideChanged(AppUser.Models.AudioGuideDto)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:AppUser.ViewModels.AudioPlayerViewModel.OnPOIChanged(AppUser.Models.POIDto)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: T:AppUser.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.ColorAnimationExtensions_Button.TextColorTo(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Button,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,Microsoft.Maui.Easing,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Animates the TextColor of an to the given color
member.param: The target color to animate the to
The time, in milliseconds, between the frames of the animation
The duration, in milliseconds, of the animation
The easing function to be used in the animation
member.returns: Value indicating if the animation completed successfully or not
